item.title: Russian Man Leaves Window Open for Three Years, Finds Apartment Invaded by Pigeons
item.description: A Russian man came back to his apartment three years after leaving for work, only to find it covered in a thick layer of pigeon droppings and feathers...

item.title: In a World First, a Chinese Robot Successfully Performed Repairs on a 10 kV Powerline
item.description: A revolutionary robot electrician recently performed repairs on a 10 kV powerline in China's Hubei Province, replacing human electricians for the firs...

item.title: Scientists Create Genetically Altered Tomato That Smells Like Butter-Flavored Popcorn
